SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript: SELECT appointmentTypeID ,appointmentTypeDescription ,isDeleted ,createdDateTime,updatedDateTime, hashKey FROM( SELECT AppointmentTypeID AS appointmentTypeID ,AppointmentTypeDesc AS appointmentTypeDescription ,IsDeleted AS isDeleted ,UpdatedDateTime AS updatedDateTime ,CreatedDateTime AS createdDateTime ,hash(concat(IfNull(AppointmentTypeID,"") ,"|",IfNull(AppointmentTypeDesc,"") ,"|", IfNull(IsDeleted,false))) AS hashKey FROM AppointmentType)
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.appointmentTypeID,"")=IfNull(t.appointmentTypeID,"") WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey THEN  UPDATE SET  appointmentTypeID = s.appointmentTypeID ,appointmentTypeDescription = s.appointmentTypeDescription ,isDeleted = s.isDeleted ,updatedDateTime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,hashKey = s.hashKey WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN  INSERT(appointmentTypeID ,appointmentTypeDescription ,isDeleted ,createdDateTime ,updatedDateTime , hashKey) VALUES ( s.appointmentTypeID ,s.appointmentTypeDescription, s.isDeleted, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, s.hashKey)
